what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG outline email/envelope icon using a rounded rectangle and a folded-envelope path.
observations: Uses an SVG viewBox of 0 0 24 24 with explicit width and height of 24.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor so the icon inherits text color.
Uses stroke-width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the envelope body with a rounded rectangle and the flap with a single path.
conventions: Follows a common 24px outline icon convention.
Uses inline SVG geometry with presentation attributes on the root element.
Uses rounded stroke caps and joins for a softened outline style.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present in the standalone SVG.
notes: A small reusable outline email icon asset that inherits color from its rendering context.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by this SVG or by the consuming component?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates an email icon, and the SVG depicts an envelope, so the apparent purpose matches the content.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable email/mail affordance icon for interface controls or labels.
contribution: Contributes a compact, color-inheriting envelope icon asset suitable for email or messaging affordances in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24px currentColor outline SVG email icon drawn as a rounded envelope rectangle with a flap path.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing email or mail actions in a reusable design-system icon set.
